results.matched_effect_cluster: Knowledge Capsules structured nonparametric memory units
results.justification: Knowledge Capsules encode structured multi-attribute memory units (direct primitive of QUIPU-MEMORY's per-entry tuple).
H-MEM uses 4-layer hierarchical memory with positional index per layer + index-based routing — same artefact (hierarchical external memory + positional retrieval).
GAM uses hierarchical graph + multi-factor retrieval combining attributes — DIRECT TWIN of QUIPU-MEMORY's combinatorial-channel filter.
ByteRover hierarchical agent-native context-curated memory — same artefact and structural mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Adaptive memory structures for LLM agents
results.justification: Adaptive memory structures — adjacent artefact level.
A-MEM uses entity-centric attribute-value structured records + contextual connections — DIRECT TWIN of multi-channel encoding + exception branch.
Memory quadruple (storage/persistence/access/control) is multi-dim memory descriptor — adjacent.
H-MEM EACL adds MoE retrieval gating with learnable weights (semantic + recency + importance) — same multi-attribute combinatorial retrieval principle.
